items.title: Memory-Based Pricing
items.description: Pay only for database container memory, not node or storage size

items.title: KubeDB Platform
items.description: Unified, self-service platform for deploying, managing, and scaling databases

items.title: Enterprise Backup
items.description: Built-in resilience with automated backup, recovery, and policy-driven governance

items.title: Multi-DB & Multi-Cluster
items.description: Use your capacity across all databases in one or more Kubernetes clusters
